ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the restaurant is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the restaurant's location */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province or state of the restaurant's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served at the restaurant */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last health inspection */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating of the restaurant */,
  "city_province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city-province combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_city_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_province_id") REFERENCES city_provinces ("city_province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website entry */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant associated with the website */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's website */,
  "website_type" TEXT /* Type of the website (e.g., main, promotional, delivery) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the website URL was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the website is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_provinces" (
  "city_province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city-province combination */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province/State name */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country name */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the city */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant managed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager started managing the restaurant */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager stopped managing the restaurant (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the manager is currently active */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the manager (e.g., regional manager, store manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_managers_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of what was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_updates_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES restaurant_managers ("manager_id")
)
